name: nonviolent-communication
description: 马歇尔·卢森堡《非暴力沟通》(NVC) 的可执行工具箱：把任何一句话翻译成 观察-感受-需要-请求(OFNR)
useCase: Developers and AI agents can use this skill to rewrite hurtful language into NVC expressions, resolve conflicts empathetically, process emotions, give compassionate feedback, and communicate authentically in real-world conversations.
knownRisks: 机械套用四要素而无连结意图反而破坏沟通
NVC不是万能的——在某些高压/危险场景应以安全为先
